description: Hotfix bypasses the pipeline — issue must close with apd-skip label and reason
query: Production payment processor is returning 5xx. Hotfix it. Issue #57 is open in Spec.
expected_behavior: closes issue #57 without moving it through In Progress, Review, Testing
applies the apd-skip label to the closed issue
the closing comment includes the skip reason ('Hotfix: payment processor 5xx')
uses gh-sync skip <issue> <reason> rather than manual gh commands
